zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Normandy De Artois於大約1293年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯阿托斯時，她的父親Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront25歲，母親Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne24歲。她於1320年9月與Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale在法國阿托斯結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1368年11月在法國諾門迪享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Normandy De Artois于大约1293年出生在法国帕-德-卡拉斯阿托斯时，她的父亲Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront25岁，母亲Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne24岁。她于1320年9月与Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale在法国阿托斯结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1368年11月在法国諾門迪享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Artois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from the French province of Artois, from Anglo-Norman French Arteis (from Latin Atrebates, the name of the local Gaulish tribe).
French: from Old French artis ‘woodworm’, Old Occitan arta ‘moth’, possibly applied as a nickname for someone suffering from a wasting disease, perhaps leprosy.

variants.name: Artist
meanings: English: alteration, by folk etymology, of   Artis  .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catharine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

nameMeanings.name: Normandy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Americanized form of French   Normandin  .

variants.name: Normandin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Normandy De Artois was born about 1293, in Artois, Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront, was 25 and her mother, Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne, was 24. She married Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale in September 1320, in Artois, France. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in November 1368, in Normandy, France, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Normandy De Artois est née environ 1293, à Artois, Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale en septembre 1320, à Artois, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en novembre 1368, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Normandy De Artois um 1293 in Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront 25 und ihre Mutter Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne 24. Sie hat im September 1320 in Artois, Frankreich Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb im November 1368 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Normandy De Artois è nata il circa 1293 nel Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale nel settembre 1320, nel Artois, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1368, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Normandy De Artoisが約1293年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスアルトイスで生まれた時，父Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfrontは25歳，母Blanche Dreux Of Bretagneは24歳であった。1320年9月にフランスアルトイスでJean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1368年11月にフランスノーマンディで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Normandy De Artois(이)가 대략 1293년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 아토이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1320년 9월 프랑스 아토이스에서 Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 11월 프랑스 노먼디에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Normandy De Artois nasceu aproximadamente 1293, em Artois, Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale em setembro de 1320, em Artois, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1368, em Normandie, França, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Normandy De Artois родилась около 1293 г. в местности артоис, пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale сентябрь 1320 г. в местности артоис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла ноябрь 1368 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Normandy De Artois nació aproximadamente 1293, en Artois, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Philip d'Artois, Seigneur de Conches, Nonancourt et Domfront, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Blanche Dreux Of Bretagne, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Jean V Comte de Ponthieu, Comte d'Aumale en septiembre de 1320, en Artois, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1368, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 76 años.
